name: playwright-mcp-parallel
description: Playwright MCP with parallel multi-instance browser support. Drop-in enhancement over @playwright/mcp.

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm publish --//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=%NPM_TOKEN% && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm publish --//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=%NPM_TOKEN% && git push && git push --tags
